name: Optimus Prime (TFP)
description:
Leader of the Autobots who commands Team Prime in Jasper, Nevada to protect Earth from the threat of the Decepticons. Season 3 storyline, takes place after he comes back from the dead to destroy the Darkmount Citadel.
